description: Aggregate leave days grouped by employee and leave type. Used for HR dashboards and leave balance tracking.
purpose: Provides a breakdown of total approved leave days per employee grouped by leave type, enabling HR managers to monitor leave utilization and remaining balances.

year.description: Year filter (e.g. '2026'). If not provided, returns all years.

fromSql: SELECT e.thr_em_name AS employee_name, lr.thr_lv_leave_type AS leave_type, COUNT(*) AS request_count, COALESCE(SUM(lr.thr_lv_days), 0) AS total_days FROM mt_thr_leave_request lr JOIN mt_thr_employee e ON lr.thr_lv_employee_id = e.pid AND e.tenant_id = #{params.tenantId} WHERE lr.tenant_id = #{params.tenantId} AND lr.thr_lv_status = 'approved' AND (#{params.year} IS NULL OR #{params.year} = '' OR EXTRACT(YEAR FROM lr.thr_lv_start_date) = CAST(#{params.year} AS INTEGER)) GROUP BY e.thr_em_name, lr.thr_lv_leave_type ORDER BY e.thr_em_name, lr.thr_lv_leave_type
